passages.passage_text: Each of these questions has an Assertion (A) and a Reason (R). Give answer (a) if both 'A' and 'R' are true and 'R' is the correct explanation of 'A' (b) if both 'A' and 'R' are true but 'R' is not the correct explanation of 'A' (c) if 'A' is true but 'R' is false (d) if 'A' is false but 'R' is true

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Assertion (A) India's 'Republic Day' falls on 26th January. Reason (R) Constitution of India, declaring India as a 'Republic', came into force on 26th January 1950.

choices.a: both 'A' and 'R' are true and 'R' is the correct explanation of 'A'
choices.b: both 'A' and 'R' are true but 'R' is not the correct explanation of 'A'

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Assertion (A) India is a democracy. Reason (R) India is a developing country.

choices.a: both 'A' and 'R' are true and 'R' is the correct explanation of 'A'
choices.b: both 'A' and 'R' are true but 'R' is not the correct explanation of 'A'

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Assertion (A) In India, the judiciary is independent of the executive. Reason (R) Judiciary favours the government and helps in the implementation of its plans.

choices.a: both 'A' and 'R' are true and 'R' is the correct explanation of 'A'
choices.b: both 'A' and 'R' are true but 'R' is not the correct explanation of 'A'

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Assertion (A) A salt water fish drinks sea water whereas a fresh water fish never drinks water. Reason (R) A salt water fish is hypertonic to its environment while a fresh water fish is not hypertonic to its environment.

choices.a: both 'A' and 'R' are true and 'R' is the correct explanation of 'A'
choices.b: both 'A' and 'R' are true but 'R' is not the correct explanation of 'A'

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Assertion (A) River Narmada flows westward. Reason (R) Narmada falls into the Bay of Bengal.

choices.a: both 'A' and 'R' are true and 'R' is the correct explanation of 'A'
choices.b: both 'A' and 'R' are true but 'R' is not the correct explanation of 'A'

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Assertion (A) Carbon monoxide when inhaled causes death. Reason (R) Carbon monoxide combines with hemoglobin.

choices.a: both 'A' and 'R' are true and 'R' is the correct explanation of 'A'
choices.b: both 'A' and 'R' are true but 'R' is not the correct explanation of 'A'

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Assertion (A) Himalayas once laid under the sea. Reason (R) Fossils of marine creatures are traced on the Himalayas.

choices.a: both 'A' and 'R' are true and 'R' is the correct explanation of 'A'
choices.b: both 'A' and 'R' are true but 'R' is not the correct explanation of 'A'

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Assertion (A) India is a secular country. Reason (R) Indian people can practice any faith they like.

choices.a: both 'A' and 'R' are true and 'R' is the correct explanation of 'A'
choices.b: both 'A' and 'R' are true but 'R' is not the correct explanation of 'A'

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Assertion (A) Tamil Nadu gets most of the rainfall in winter. Reason (R) Tamil Nadu gets rainfall from retreating monsoons.

choices.a: both 'A' and 'R' are true and 'R' is the correct explanation of 'A'
choices.b: both 'A' and 'R' are true but 'R' is not the correct explanation of 'A'

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Assertion (A) Eskimos reside in igloos. Reason (R) No other material except snow is available.

choices.a: both 'A' and 'R' are true and 'R' is the correct explanation of 'A'
choices.b: both 'A' and 'R' are true but 'R' is not the correct explanation of 'A'

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Assertion (A) Clothes are not washed properly in hard water. Reason (R) Hard water contains many minerals.

choices.a: both 'A' and 'R' are true and 'R' is the correct explanation of 'A'
choices.b: both 'A' and 'R' are true but 'R' is not the correct explanation of 'A'

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Assertion (A) The common value of all regligion should be taught to the children in our schools. Reason (R) Yes, it will help inculcating moral values amongst the children of our country.

choices.a: both 'A' and 'R' are true and 'R' is the correct explanation of 'A'
choices.b: both 'A' and 'R' are true but 'R' is not the correct explanation of 'A'

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Assertion (A) India Gandhi was the Prime Minister of India for many years. Reason (R) Indira Gandhi was the daughter of Jawaharlal Nehru.

choices.a: both 'A' and 'R' are true and 'R' is the correct explanation of 'A'
choices.b: both 'A' and 'R' are true but 'R' is not the correct explanation of 'A'

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Assertion (A) India is a 'sovereign' country. Reason (R) Policies of India are decided by USA.

choices.a: both 'A' and 'R' are true and 'R' is the correct explanation of 'A'
choices.b: both 'A' and 'R' are true but 'R' is not the correct explanation of 'A'

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Assertion (A) Mahatma Gandhi is considered as 'Father of the nation' in India. Reason (R) Mahatma Gandhi was the first Governor General of Independent India.

choices.a: both 'A' and 'R' are true and 'R' is the correct explanation of 'A'
choices.b: both 'A' and 'R' are true but 'R' is not the correct explanation of 'A'

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Assertion (A) 'DNA' Finger Printing has become an important test to establish paternity and identify of criminal of rape cases. Reason (R) Small samples such as hair, dried blood and semen are adequate for DNA analysis.

choices.a: both 'A' and 'R' are true and 'R' is the correct explanation of 'A'
choices.b: both 'A' and 'R' are true but 'R' is not the correct explanation of 'A'

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Assertion (A) Interpersonal roles relate to a person's behaviour that focuses on interpersonal contact. Reason (R) Such roles are derived directly from the authority and status.

choices.a: both 'A' and 'R' are true and 'R' is the correct explanation of 'A'
choices.b: both 'A' and 'R' are true but 'R' is not the correct explanation of 'A'

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Assertion (A) Seeds should be treated with fungicide before sowing. Reason (R) Without treating with fungicides, the seeds do not germinate.

choices.a: both 'A' and 'R' are true and 'R' is the correct explanation of 'A'
choices.b: both 'A' and 'R' are true but 'R' is not the correct explanation of 'A'

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Assertion (A) Too much work causes stress. Reason (R) It disturbs the body balance between its capacity and the demand.

choices.a: both 'A' and 'R' are true and 'R' is the correct explanation of 'A'
choices.b: both 'A' and 'R' are true but 'R' is not the correct explanation of 'A'
